pageContext.name: Kong with Snake
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints and the Frank Frazetta Art Museum present the Kong with Snake Fine Art Print.  Witness the Eighth Wonder, a true treasure of the ancient world! The legendary Frank Frazetta turned his talents to many subjects across fantasy, sci-fi, and horror artwork and undeniably shaped popular imagination with his iconic works of art. In Kong with Snake, the artistic titan tackles a gargantuan subject as the creature uses his monstrous strength to fend off a slithering serpent amid temple ruins in a jungle. A nude woman lies fearfully at the great ape's feet, bringing beauty into the realm of the beast in this earthy composition.  Each Kong with Snake Fine Art Print in the limited edition of 300 pieces includes a Certificate of Authenticity and features a hand-stamped, authorized signature of artist Frank Frazetta as well as the official Frazetta Art Museum embossed Seal of Authenticity. A portion of the proceeds from sales of Kong with Snake will directly benefit the Frazetta Art Museum's preservation and exhibition of the artist's essential works. Available unframed and in a custom framed format, this is a unique, high-end addition to any fantasy art collection.  Capture the primal power for yourself and bring home the Kong with Snake Fine Art Print by Frank Frazetta today.
